description: This file defines the network of relationships between elements in Element City.
usage: Relationships define how elements interact with each other. They provide context for conversations and enrich the city's social fabric. When a child asks about an element's friends, the conversation engine uses this data to generate responses. The admin dashboard visualizes these relationships as a network graph.

fields.sourceId: The element ID that has the relationship (the one who feels this way)
fields.targetId: The element ID that the relationship is with
fields.type: Relationship type: best-friend, friend, rival, family, mentor, neutral, acquaintance

relationships.description: We made water together—two of me and one of you holding hands! H₂O forever!
We hang out in hydrocarbons and methane. Carbon and I make a great team!
We're both light and floaty. We understand each other!
Together we make ammonia (NH₃) through the Haber process—super important for plants!
We're both light gases—we float around together!
Deep-sea divers breathe a mix of us two so they don't get nitrogen narcosis!
We don't react much—I'm a noble gas, so I keep to myself.
We make CO₂ together—plants love it! And it's how I help life on Earth.
We're in hydrocarbons together. It's a beautiful friendship!
We don't talk much, but I'm in some of their compounds.
Gold is impressive, but I'm the one that makes life possible!
We make ammonia (NH₃) together—super important for fertilizer!
We're both in the air—you're 21%, I'm 78%. We're the dream team of the atmosphere!
We cross paths sometimes in compounds, but I'm more of a loner.
We made water together—two Hydrogens and one Oxygen holding hands! H₂O forever!
We make CO₂ together—plants breathe it in and love it!
We're friends, but it gets awkward when I cause rust. We talked it out and we're still cool!
We're both in the air—you're 78%, I'm 21%. We're the dream team!
We make sodium oxide together. Sodium gets a bit explosive, but we get along!
We both love reacting with things, but chlorine is just too aggressive. We compete for attention!
We make table salt (NaCl)—the most famous couple in Element City!
We make sodium oxide together. I get a bit explosive, but Oxygen keeps me calm!
We make sodium amalgam sometimes. It's a strange friendship.
We make table salt (NaCl)—the most famous couple in Element City!
We make hydrochloric acid (HCl)—strong and useful!
We both love reacting with things, but I'm more aggressive. I think I'm better!
We're friends, but it's awkward when I get rusty (iron oxide). We talked it out and we're still cool!
We make steel together—the strongest material in the city!
Gold is shiny and fancy, but I do the real work. We respect each other.
Iron does the hard work while I shine. We respect each other's roles.
I don't react with Oxygen—that's why I never tarnish! I'm too noble for that.
Carbon is impressive with all its forms, but I've been treasured for millennia.
We make sodium amalgam sometimes. It's a strange but useful friendship.
We're both ancient metals. Gold is more famous, but I'm more mysterious!
We don't react much. I'm too slippery for that.
